series_metadata.series_description: Includes information affecting an employee's employment and payroll status in the Department of Health. Includes the following information: State of Ohio Department of Health identification, employee exemption certification (Form #IT-4), municipal tax l

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain for one year in the office area after employment has termin- ated. Transfer records to State Records Center and maintain for nine years, then destroy, provided no litigation is pending., Paper: Shred
